parsed.refined_request: The web application web_app runs on the Apache web server version 2.4.57, which is hosted on the virtual machine vm_apache. The vm_apache machine runs Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (64-bit) with 4 num_cpus, 8 GB mem_size, and 100 GB disk_size. The web_app connects to the MySQL database production_db version 8.0.36, which is hosted on the DBMS MySQL version 8.0.36. The DBMS is hosted on the virtual machine vm_mysql, running Ubuntu Server 22.04 LTS (64-bit) with 8 num_cpus, 16 GB mem_size, and 500 GB disk_size, based on x86_64 architecture. The production_db database uses the credentials user 'admin', password 'db123', and is accessible on port 3306. The MySQL DBMS is configured with the root password 'R00tSecure!2026'.
parsed.tosca_template:
tosca_definitions_version: tosca_simple_yaml_1_3
description: A web application architecture consisting of a web application running
  on an Apache web server hosted on a virtual machine, connected to a MySQL database.
  The database is managed by a MySQL DBMS hosted on another virtual machine.
node_types:
  computeWithblocNetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithnetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithblocStorage:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithDatabase:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjStorage:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjBDD:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  StorageForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
    capabilities:
      storage:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Storage
  RuntimeForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Runtime
    capabilities:
      host:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Compute
  NetworkForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.network.Network
    capabilities:
      network:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Network
  ContainerWithDatabase:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Application
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
data_types:
  acme.datatypes.Location:
    derived_from: tosca.datatypes.Root
    description: 'A deployment location: region and/or availability zone.'
    properties:
      region:
        type: string
        required: false
      availability_zone:
        type: string
        required: false
policy_types:
  acme.policies.Placement:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Placement
    description: Geographic placement constraint (region and/or availability zone).
    properties:
      locations:
        type: list
        required: true
        entry_schema:
          type: acme.datatypes.Location
      distribution:
        type: string
        default: multi_region
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - single_region
          - multi_region
  acme.policies.Availability:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Service-level availability target (percent).
    properties:
      availability:
        type: float
        required: true
        constraints:
        - in_range:
          - 0.0
          - 100.0
  acme.policies.Latency:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Maximum tolerated network latency.
    properties:
      max_latency:
        type: scalar-unit.time
        required: true
        constraints:
        - greater_than: 0 ms
  acme.policies.Cost:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Root
    description: Budget constraint over a billing period.
    properties:
      max_cost:
        type: float
        required: true
      currency:
        type: string
        default: USD
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - USD
          - EUR
          - GBP
      period:
        type: string
        default: monthly
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - hourly
          - daily
          - monthly
          - yearly
topology_template:
  node_templates:
    web_app:
      type: WebAppWithDatabase
      capabilities:
        app_endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: http
            secure: false
      requirements:
      - host: apache_web_server
      - database_connection: production_db
    apache_web_server:
      type: WebServer
      requirements:
      - host: vm_apache
    vm_apache:
      type: Compute
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: vm_apache
            num_cpus: 4
            disk_size: 100 GB
            mem_size: 8 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: Linux
            distribution: Ubuntu
            version: 22.04.0
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: http
            secure: false
    mysql_dbms:
      type: DBMS
      properties:
        root_password: R00tSecure!2026
        port: 3306
        component_version: 8.0.36
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: mysql_dbms
      requirements:
      - host: vm_mysql
    vm_mysql:
      type: Compute
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: vm_mysql
            num_cpus: 8
            disk_size: 500 GB
            mem_size: 16 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: Linux
            distribution: Ubuntu
            version: 22.04.0
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
            port: 3306
            secure: false
    production_db:
      type: Database
      properties:
        name: production_db
        port: 3306
        user: admin
        password: db123
      requirements:
      - host: mysql_dbms
    apache_software_component:
      type: SoftwareComponent
      properties:
        component_version: 2.4.57
      requirements:
      - host: vm_apache

parsed.refined_request: The web application webapp version 1.0.0, with a context root of '/app', runs on the Apache web server version 2.4.57, which is hosted on the virtual machine vm_web. The vm_web machine runs Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (64-bit) with 4 num_cpus, 8 GB mem_size, and 100 GB disk_size. The web application webapp connects to the MySQL database db_app version 8.0.36, which is hosted on the MySQL DBMS version 8.0.36. The DBMS is hosted on the virtual machine vm_db, running Ubuntu Server 22.04 LTS (64-bit) with 8 num_cpus, 16 GB mem_size, and 500 GB disk_size. The DBMS is configured with a root password and listens on port 3306, while the database db_app is configured with the name 'app_db', user 'app_user', and password 'app_password'.

description: A web application architecture consisting of a web application running

parsed.refined_request: The web application StaticPageApp with a context root of "/" runs on the web server Nginx version 1.25.0, which is hosted on the virtual machine vm_web running Ubuntu 22.04 LTS 64-bit with 8 num_cpus, 16 GB mem_size, and 200 GB disk_size. StaticPageApp connects to the database production_db, which is hosted on the MySQL DBMS version 8.0.0. The MySQL DBMS is configured with a root password of "RootPass123!", a port of 3306, and a database user "prod_user" with the password "ProdPass456!". The DBMS is hosted on the virtual machine vm_db running Ubuntu 22.04 LTS 64-bit with 8 num_cpus, 16 GB mem_size, and 200 GB disk_size. The machines vm_web and vm_db connect to the network app_network.
parsed.tosca_template:
tosca_definitions_version: tosca_simple_yaml_1_3
description: Architecture for a web application StaticPageApp running on Nginx, connected
  to a MySQL database production_db. The web server and DBMS are hosted on separate
  virtual machines (vm_web and vm_db) running Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, both connected to
  the network app_network.
node_types:
  computeWithblocNetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithnetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithblocStorage:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithDatabase:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjStorage:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjBDD:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  StorageForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
    capabilities:
      storage:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Storage
  RuntimeForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Runtime
    capabilities:
      host:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Compute
  NetworkForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.network.Network
    capabilities:
      network:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Network
  ContainerWithDatabase:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Application
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
data_types:
  acme.datatypes.Location:
    derived_from: tosca.datatypes.Root
    description: 'A deployment location: region and/or availability zone.'
    properties:
      region:
        type: string
        required: false
      availability_zone:
        type: string
        required: false
policy_types:
  acme.policies.Placement:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Placement
    description: Geographic placement constraint (region and/or availability zone).
    properties:
      locations:
        type: list
        required: true
        entry_schema:
          type: acme.datatypes.Location
      distribution:
        type: string
        default: multi_region
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - single_region
          - multi_region
  acme.policies.Availability:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Service-level availability target (percent).
    properties:
      availability:
        type: float
        required: true
        constraints:
        - in_range:
          - 0.0
          - 100.0
  acme.policies.Latency:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Maximum tolerated network latency.
    properties:
      max_latency:
        type: scalar-unit.time
        required: true
        constraints:
        - greater_than: 0 ms
  acme.policies.Cost:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Root
    description: Budget constraint over a billing period.
    properties:
      max_cost:
        type: float
        required: true
      currency:
        type: string
        default: USD
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - USD
          - EUR
          - GBP
      period:
        type: string
        default: monthly
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - hourly
          - daily
          - monthly
          - yearly
topology_template:
  node_templates:
    StaticPageApp:
      type: WebAppWithDatabase
      properties:
        context_root: /
      capabilities:
        app_endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: http
            port: 80
            secure: false
      requirements:
      - host: Nginx
      - database_connection: production_db
    Nginx:
      type: WebServer
      requirements:
      - host: vm_web
    vm_web:
      type: computeWithnetwork
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: vm_web
            num_cpus: 8
            disk_size: 200 GB
            mem_size: 16 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: linux
            distribution: Ubuntu
            version: 22.04.0
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: http
            port: 80
            secure: false
            network_name: app_network
      requirements:
      - network_link: app_network
    production_db:
      type: Database
      properties:
        name: production_db
        port: 3306
        user: prod_user
        password: ProdPass456!
      requirements:
      - host: MySQL_DBMS
    MySQL_DBMS:
      type: DBMS
      properties:
        root_password: RootPass123!
        port: 3306
        component_version: 8.0.0
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: MySQL_DBMS
            num_cpus: 8
            disk_size: 200 GB
            mem_size: 16 GB
      requirements:
      - host: vm_db
    vm_db:
      type: computeWithnetwork
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: vm_db
            num_cpus: 8
            disk_size: 200 GB
            mem_size: 16 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: linux
            distribution: Ubuntu
            version: 22.04.0
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
            port: 3306
            secure: false
            network_name: app_network
      requirements:
      - network_link: app_network
    app_network:
      type: Network
      properties:
        ip_version: 4
      capabilities:
        link: {}

parsed.refined_request: The container application app_docker is allocated 5 vCPUs and 20 GB of memory, runs on the container runtime Docker Engine version 24.0.0, and is hosted on the virtual machine vm_docker_runtime running Ubuntu 22.04 LTS with architecture x86_64, 8 num_cpus, 32 GB mem_size, and 100 GB disk_size. The container application app_docker connects to the IPv4 network docker_network with ip_version 4 and attaches to the object storage app-storage-prod with a name of app-storage-prod and a size of 500 GB.

conflicts.explanation: A single criterion blocks: relaxing it is enough.
A single criterion blocks: relaxing it is enough.

relaxations.cible: vm_docker_runtime (compute) — No cloud provider offers a virtual machine with 60 GB of memory, which is required for the Docker runtime host.
relaxations.action: Reduce memory requirement: Lower the memory requirement for the virtual machine from 60 GB to **32 GB** (the maximum available in the catalog).
relaxations.explanation: The Docker runtime host will have less memory available, which may reduce performance or limit the ability to run memory-intensive workloads alongside your application. However, this is the only way to deploy using the current cloud provider offerings.

relaxations.cible: vm_docker_runtime (compute) — No cloud provider offers a virtual machine running Ubuntu 22.04 LTS with a '64-bit' architecture label, even though the hardware is 64-bit capable.
relaxations.action: Adjust the architecture label: Change the architecture requirement from '64-bit' to 'x86_64' (the only available value in the catalog).
relaxations.explanation: The virtual machine will still run in 64-bit mode, as 'x86_64' is the technical name for 64-bit x86 architecture. No functional or performance impact; only the label in the request is updated to match the provider's naming convention.

parsed.tosca_template:
tosca_definitions_version: tosca_simple_yaml_1_3
description: Architecture for a containerized application (app_docker) running on
  Docker Engine, hosted on a virtual machine (vm_docker_runtime). The application
  connects to an IPv4 network (docker_network) and attaches to an object storage (app-storage-prod).
node_types:
  computeWithblocNetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithnetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithblocStorage:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithDatabase:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjStorage:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - object_connection:

    description: 'A deployment location: region and/or availability zone.'
    properties:
      region:
        type: string
        required: false
      availability_zone:
        type: string
        required: false
policy_types:
  acme.policies.Placement:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Placement
    description: Geographic placement constraint (region and/or availability zone).
    properties:
      locations:
        type: list
        required: true
        entry_schema:
          type: acme.datatypes.Location
      distribution:
        type: string
        default: multi_region
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - single_region
          - multi_region
  acme.policies.Availability:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Service-level availability target (percent).
    properties:
      availability:
        type: float
        required: true
        constraints:
        - in_range:
          - 0.0
          - 100.0
  acme.policies.Latency:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Maximum tolerated network latency.
    properties:
      max_latency:
        type: scalar-unit.time
        required: true
        constraints:
        - greater_than: 0 ms

    derived_from: tosca.policies.Root
    description: Budget constraint over a billing period.
    properties:
      max_cost:
        type: float
        required: true

        type: string
        default: USD

        - valid_values:
          - USD

          - GBP
      period:
        type: string
        default: monthly
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - hourly
          - daily
          - monthly
          - yearly
topology_template:
  node_templates:
    app_docker:
      type: Container.Application
      requirements:
      - host: docker_engine
      - network: docker_network
      - storage: app_storage_prod
    docker_engine:
      type: RuntimeForContainer
      capabilities:
        host: {}
      requirements:
      - host: vm_docker_runtime
    vm_docker_runtime:
      type: Compute
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: vm_docker_runtime
            num_cpus: 8
            disk_size: 100 GB
            mem_size: 32 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: Linux
            distribution: Ubuntu
            version: 22.04.0
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        binding: {}
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
    docker_network:
      type: NetworkForContainer
      properties:
        ip_version: 4
      capabilities:
        link: {}
    app_storage_prod:
      type: StorageForContainer
      properties:
        name: app-storage-prod
        size: 500 GB
      capabilities:
        storage_endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: tcp
            secure: false
